name: numbis
description: A tiling window manager script for KWin (Plasma 6).

scripts.build:release: npm run build:internal && cp metadata-release.json metadata.json
scripts.build:dev: npm run build:internal && cp metadata-dev.json metadata.json
scripts.uninstall: qdbus6 org.kde.KWin /Scripting unloadScript numbis || true; kpackagetool6 --type=KWin/Script -r numbis || true
scripts.dev-test: npm run uninstall:all && npm run build:dev && kpackagetool6 --type=KWin/Script -i . && kwriteconfig6 --file kwinrc --group Plugins --key numbis-devEnabled true && qdbus6 org.kde.KWin /KWin reconfigure && journalctl -f QT_CATEGORY=js QT_CATEGORY=kwin_scripting && npm run uninstall:all
scripts.uninstall:all: qdbus6 org.kde.KWin /Scripting unloadScript numbis || true; qdbus6 org.kde.KWin /Scripting unloadScript numbis-dev || true; kpackagetool6 --type=KWin/Script -r numbis || true; kpackagetool6 --type=KWin/Script -r numbis-dev || true; rm -rf ~/.local/share/kwin/scripts/numbis* || true; kbuildsycoca6 --noincremental || true
